prompt: Find the 3 most-cited papers on retrieval-augmented generation published after 2020. For each, give a one-sentence summary and DOI or arXiv id.
forbidden_behaviors: Citing papers not retrieved by tools
Reporting citation counts without a source

rubric.2: Partially relevant papers but missing identifiers or weak grounding.
rubric.3: Relevant grounded papers with identifiers and concise summaries.
